result.stdout:
gensam 0.2.1
Copyright (c) 2020 Muaz Othman
USAGE:
Generate a SAM template for the combination of all draw.io diagrams in current
folder:
  gensam
Generate a SAM template for the combination of all draw.io diagrams in a
specified folder:
  gensam --input C:\diagrams
Generate a SAM template for the combination of specific draw.io diagrams:
  gensam --input 1.drawio 2.drawio
Generate a SAM template a draw.io diagrams and timestamp output file:
  gensam --output template-{0:yyyy-MM-dd_hh_mm_ss}.yaml

  --input             (Default: .) Input files/folders to be processed.

  --output            (Default: template.yaml) Output file for SAM template.

  --writersettings    Path to JSON file with SAM writer settings.

  --exts              (Default: drawio) File extensions to use when scanning
                      folders for diagram files.

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.
